basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) has released the official Research Associate Notification 2026 at www.iimk.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIM Kozhikode Research Associate Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a Post-Graduation in HR, Community Development, Psychology, Sociology, or related disciplines, along with relevant research experience, and aged up to 40 years can apply online on or before 04-08-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduation in HR, Community Development, Psychology, Sociology, Case study/Journal papers/articles published, Experience in conducting FDGs, in-depth interviews, Exposure to quantitative and/or Qualitative Data Analysis including SPSS/R/STATA/NVIVO/ATLAS-Ti
qualification.details: Post-graduation in HR, Community Development, Psychology, Sociology. Case study/Journal papers/articles published. Experience in conducting FDGs, in-depth interviews. Exposure to quantitative and/or Qualitative Data Analysis including SPSS/R/STATA/NVIVO/ATLAS-Ti.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Research Associate Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIM Kozhikode Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Research Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIM Kozhikode Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIM Kozhikode Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Research Associate Vacancy Details 2026
IIM Kozhikode Research Associate Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Post-graduation in HR, Community Development, Psychology, Sociology. Case study/Journal papers/articles published. Experience in conducting FDGs, in-depth interviews. Exposure to quantitative and/or Qualitative Data Analysis including SPSS/R/STATA/NVIVO/ATLAS-Ti.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Research Associate Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIM Kozhikode Research Associate Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Research Associate Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Associate position at IIM Kozhikode?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Research Associate position at IIM Kozhikode is 04-08-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate post at IIM Kozhikode.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Post-graduation in HR, Community Development, Psychology, or Sociology, along with published work and relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate position is 40 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Screening, Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for applying to this post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q8. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted in online mode only.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIM Kozhikode located?
faq.answer: IIM Kozhikode is located in Kozhikode, Kerala.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article or via the official website of IIM Kozhikode.
